narrative: npm led with 79% of weekly downloads. Top package: sovereignty-game (212 this week). Top gainer: @mcptoolshop/repomesh (+75.0%; Δ3). Concentration: top 5 = 23.7%. Data is partial (degraded: PyPI) (51 packages used cached previous data).

narrativeLines.label: Registry Lead
narrativeLines.text: npm led with 79% of 3,525 weekly downloads followed by PyPI (21%).

narrativeLines.label: Top Package
narrativeLines.text: sovereignty-game with 212 downloads this week. Runner-up: @ai-rpg-engine/modules (167).

narrativeLines.label: Concentration
narrativeLines.text: Top 5 packages account for 23.7% of weekly downloads. Downloads are well-distributed across the portfolio.

narrativeLines.label: Data Health
narrativeLines.text: Data is partial (degraded: PyPI) (51 packages used cached previous data).

recommendations.title: 8 packages losing momentum
recommendations.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-detective, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-cyberpunk and 5 more show sustained decline. Consider: release updates, fix open issues, or update documentation.

recommendations.title: High portfolio concentration
recommendations.detail: Gini coefficient 0.80 indicates downloads are heavily concentrated in a few packages. Diversify promotion efforts across the portfolio.

recommendations.title: Heavy npm dependency
recommendations.detail: 79% of downloads come from npm. Consider cross-publishing to PyPI and NuGet to reduce single-registry risk.

recommendations.title: 13 packages predicted to grow
recommendations.detail: Statistical models predict >20% growth in the next 7 days for @mcptoolshop/sovereignty, @ai-rpg-engine/presentation, @mcptoolshop/registry-stats.

recommendations.title: 24 packages with repeated spikes
recommendations.detail: Multiple download spikes detected for @ai-rpg-engine/starter-fantasy, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-zombie, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-pirate. Could indicate bot activity, viral posts, or dependency adoption.

actionableAdvice.title: 75 packages in critical health
actionableAdvice.detail: sovereignty-game, mcp-bouncer, backpropagate, tool-compass, mcpt scored below 20/100.
actionableAdvice.action: Review these packages for broken installs, outdated dependencies, or missing documentation. Consider archiving if no longer maintained.

actionableAdvice.title: Portfolio concentration risk
actionableAdvice.detail: Gini coefficient 0.80 — downloads are concentrated in a few packages.
actionableAdvice.action: Promote underperforming packages in README badges, blog posts, and release notes of popular packages.

actionableAdvice.title: 79% of traffic from npm
actionableAdvice.detail: Single-registry dependency increases blast radius if npm has outages or policy changes.
actionableAdvice.action: Cross-publish key packages to PyPI (via wrapper) or NuGet. Add install instructions for all registries in READMEs.

actionableAdvice.title: 8 packages with untapped potential
actionableAdvice.detail: @ai-rpg-engine/modules, @ai-rpg-engine/starter-detective, @ai-rpg-engine/content-schema have active users but stalled growth.
actionableAdvice.action: Add new features, improve docs, or create tutorials. Small efforts can shift these from D to C+ quickly.
